settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDescription: Choose between dark, light, or follow your system preference.
settings.fontDescription: Pick a typeface for the entire interface.
settings.accentColourDescription: Highlights, active states, and progress bars all follow this colour.
settings.cardSizeDescription: Adjust the width of album and artist cards across all views.
settings.compactModeDescription: Reduce spacing across the sidebar, top bar, and player for a denser layout.
settings.customColorsDescription: Override individual semantic colors for a fully custom look.
settings.visualizerColorsDescription: Customize the frequency band colors used in spectrum, VU meter, and oscilloscope visualizers.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the display language for the interface.
settings.notificationsDescription: Show an OS notification when a new track starts playing.
settings.debugDescription: Show the debug panel with engine stats and logs.
settings.imageCacheDescription: Artwork fetched from Plex and external metadata sources.
settings.libraryCacheDescription: Cached playlists, hubs, and recently added items.
settings.metadataCacheDescription: Cached artist and album page data for instant navigation.

home.notConnected: Not connected. Go to Settings to connect.
